name: Dev Guard
summary: Preflight checks for safe local AgentPlane development sessions.
description: Provides a lightweight scenario set for agentplane contributors: checks toolchain availability, branch hygiene, and quick quality gates before code changes.

scenarios.name: Run local dev preflight
scenarios.summary: Validate local workspace, toolchain, and workflow readiness before development work.
scenarios.description: Use this scenario before touching core development files when changing release or distribution-related behavior.
use_when: You start a new local development session for AgentPlane.
A change affects CI, release, or distribution workflow files.
You need a quick safety checklist before coding begins.
avoid_when: The task is purely documentation copy editing with no CLI runtime impact.
